## Type of change

- [ ] Editorial (typo, formatting, non-normative wording)
- [ ] Clarification (resolves ambiguity without changing normative meaning)
- [ ] Substantive (changes normative requirements)
- [ ] Structural (reorganisation, new section, removed section)

## Checklist

- [ ] I have read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] Normative keywords (MUST, SHALL, SHOULD, MAY) are used in accordance with RFC 2119
- [ ] Cross-references to other sections are correct
- [ ] If this is a substantive change, a GitHub Discussion or Issue exists with community feedback
- [ ] Conformance requirements are updated if normative behaviour changed
